mapper.select: SELECT id, login_id, password_hash, display_name, guide_language, active, created_at, updated_at FROM guide_staff WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, login_id, password_hash, display_name, guide_language, active, created_at, updated_at FROM guide_staff WHERE login_id = #{loginId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, login_id, password_hash, display_name, guide_language, active, created_at, updated_at FROM guide_staff WHERE active = TRUE ORDER BY guide_language ASC, display_name ASC
SELECT id, login_id, password_hash, display_name, guide_language, active, created_at, updated_at FROM guide_staff WHERE guide_language = #{guideLanguage} AND active = TRUE ORDER BY display_name ASC
